HistoryItem.title: HistoryItem
HistoryItem.description: A record of a generated video.

id.description: Unique identifier for the history item.

userId.description: The UID of the user who generated the video.

params.description: The parameters used for video generation.

timestamp.description: The time the video was generated.

videoUrl.description: The URL of the generated video (temporary).

videoUri.description: The permanent URI of the generated video from Gemini.

UserUsage.title: UserUsage
UserUsage.description: Tracks a user's video generation usage.

lastGenerated.description: The timestamp of the last generation.

countToday.description: The number of videos generated today.

tier.description: The user's subscription tier (free, pro, enterprise).

subscriptionExpiresAt.description: The timestamp when the subscription expires.

/history/{historyId}.description: Collection of video generation history items.
